name: Menu Item Showcase
description: Highlight a signature dish or daily special
prompt_template: Write an Instagram-style post for a restaurant. Highlight the dish: {dish_name}. Key ingredient to emphasize: {key_ingredient}. Price point: {price_point}. Restaurant vibe: {restaurant_vibe}. Unique feature or benefit: {unique_feature}. Use appetizing sensory language, include 2-3 food emojis, state a clear benefit/feature, end with a call-to-action (e.g. visit today, order now), and suggest 3-5 relevant hashtags.

variables.name: dish_name
variables.description: Name of the dish to showcase

variables.name: price_point
variables.description: Price or price range for the dish

variables.name: restaurant_vibe
variables.description: Atmosphere or style of the restaurant

variables.name: unique_feature
variables.description: What makes this dish or experience special
